# Range Operator

Range operator for generating sequences

```perl
@numbers = ($start .. $end);
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
@numbers = ($start .. $end);
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
@numbers = ($start .. $end);
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
